top_rejections.reason: basket guardrail: no tail NO leg passed the norm

learnings: NO side: 4/6 won, net $+1.07 this window.
YES side: 0/3 won, net $-0.59 this window.
Most frequent gate rejections: spread (9068x); basket guardrail: no tail NO leg passed the norm (1364x).
Clean next-day forecast error averaged 3.64F across 6 settled day(s) in this window.
recommended_changes: Sample is small (9 resolved trades); treat window ROI as noise and wait for at least 15 resolved trades before changing gates.
Mean absolute forecast error is 3.64F; review source weights and recent Google/NWS disagreement before trusting tail bins.

profitability_gate.reason: No dataset source gets live trading weight until it has an after-cost market backtest with at least 30 matched trades. Current collected trade rows: 0.

dataset_research.promotion_rule: Collect broadly, but do not give a new source live model weight or loosen paper-trading gates until it improves held-out forecast error and then survives an after-cost market backtest with enough trades.

disclaimer: Paper-trading research only. The active AWS execution calibration remains pinned to lstm; this artifact does not place live orders.

research_notes.note: Replay historical rows to see how probabilities scored after outcomes were known.
Using information that was not available at trade time; Strategy Lab separates pre-resolution rows.
A signal recorded before market close or an observed-high lock.
Repeated 15-minute scans are reduced to one sampled row per target, market, and side.
How closely stated probabilities match observed win frequencies.
Squared probability error; lower is better.
Penalty for assigning low probability to what happened; lower is better.
Simulated positions recorded for research. No live money is placed.
A research calibration compared against the active execution calibration.
